prompt: Create a moody cinematic night photograph shot from inside a city bus or tram, looking past a seated passenger toward a large rain-speckled window filled with reflected neon and traffic bokeh. The scene should feel urban, anonymous, and slightly melancholic, with deep blue and teal tones, red and white out-of-focus street lights, and a glowing cyan sign near the upper left that loosely reads veep. A single dark-haired passenger is positioned slightly right of center in silhouette, with only the head and shoulders partly visible against the window reflections; cover the passenger's face with one large opaque square privacy block, centered over the face, in a dark charcoal-blue color. Use a wide cinematic aspect ratio, shallow depth of field, heavy film grain, low-light analog photography texture, soft reflections on glass, and no sharp readable details except the intentional blurred sign. Keep the composition quiet and atmospheric, with the window frame and bus interior forming dark vertical borders on the right and left. The privacy square should be exactly one discrete censor block, flat-edged and untextured, occupying roughly one quarter of the image width.
